title: Want a column that shows which Sprint this item is in and auto adjusts
excerpt: I don’t want an automation. I want a SIMPLE SIMPLE SIMPLE column that literally says “Sprint” and then I can type “2-7” or “8-10”.

posts.author: kellywicz (Kathryn Ellywicz)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t want an automation. I want a SIMPLE SIMPLE SIMPLE column that literally says “Sprint” and then I can type “2-7” or “8-10”.
